name: cc-triad-dev
description: Three-agent orchestration pipeline for Claude Code: architect (Opus design) -> glm-coder (GLM-5.1 cloud implementation) -> codex-reviewer (Codex independent review), with optional kimi-vision (Kimi-K2.5 cloud multimodal).

plugins.name: cc-triad-dev
plugins.description: Routes each development phase to its strongest model instead of relying on one generalist. Triggers automatically on feature requests, bug fixes, and UI mockups.
